title: Shred It!
short_description: Tear down an ever-changing paper-craft mountain, dodging hazards and chasing high scores in this side-scrolling snowboard runner.
description: Tear your way down an ever-changing and dynamic paper-craft terrain, carefully avoiding environmental and wildlife hazards that could end your perfect run in a heartbeat! Compete for the ultimate high-score against your friends and the worldwide Shred It! community.
